vocab.meaning: thành phố ngột ngạt với toàn bê tông và nhà cao tầng
vocab.example: My neighborhood has slowly transformed into a concrete jungle, with high-rises springing up on every corner.
Several new apartment complexes now obstruct the view of the mountains that I used to enjoy from my balcony.
Just a stone's throw from my house is a glass-clad skyscraper that is considered a true architectural marvel.

vocab.meaning: làm cho cái gì đó trở nên nhỏ bé (so với cái khác)
vocab.example: The massive commercial towers nearby completely dwarf the traditional two-story houses in our alley.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường mang nghĩa tiêu cực)
vocab.example: The rapid urban sprawl in this district has led to a vertical expansion, resulting in a cluster of residential skyscrapers.

vocab.meaning: mặt tiền lấp lánh (thường của tòa nhà kính)
vocab.example: At sunset, the shimmering facade of the nearby corporate headquarters reflects a beautiful golden light.

vocab.meaning: Gần ngay sát, có thể đi bộ tới được
vocab.example: There are several state-of-the-art office buildings within walking distance of my apartment.
These luxury penthouses soar into the sky, offering a panoramic view of the entire cityscape.

vocab.meaning: nổi bật nhất/thống trị đường chân trời
vocab.example: The twin towers located just behind my street really dominate the skyline of this part of the city.

vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp (thường đi kèm khu vực có nhà cao tầng)
vocab.example: Living surrounded by high-rises means I am constantly immersed in the hustle and bustle of city life.
